title: valeriana scandens
intro: Valeriana scandens, also known as creeping valerian or scrambling valerian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This perennial plant is native to the mountains of Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Valeriana scandens include relief from insomnia, restlessness, and nervous disorders, as well as its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Valeriana scandens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
